results.rendered_html: apatrap 1 A. To be ashamed, be bashful, hang down the face through shame; (with instr. of person or thing); yenāpatrapate sādhurasādhustena tuṣyati Mb; ya ātmanāpatrapate bhṛśaṃ naraḥ sa sarvalokaṃsya gururbhavatyuta ibid.; tasmādbalairapatrepe  Bk. 14. 84  turned away from with shame.
